inputs.label: Conversion Direction
inputs.businessContext: 0 for Cylindrical to Cartesian, 1 for Cartesian to Cylindrical

inputs.label: Azimuth (θ)
inputs.businessContext: Angle in degrees, measured from positive x-axis

outputs.primary: direction === 0 ? `Cartesian: x = ${xResult.toFixed(4)}, y = ${yResult.toFixed(4)}, z = ${z.toFixed(4)}` : `Cylindrical: r = ${rResult.toFixed(4)}, θ = ${thetaDeg.toFixed(4)}°, z = ${z.toFixed(4)}`
breakdown: direction === 0 ? `Step 1: Convert θ from degrees to radians: θ_rad = ${theta}° × π/180 = ${thetaRad.toFixed(4)} rad` : `Step 1: Compute r = √(x² + y²) = √(${x}² + ${y}²) = ${rResult.toFixed(4)}`
direction === 0 ? `Step 2: x = r·cos(θ_rad) = ${r} × cos(${thetaRad.toFixed(4)}) = ${xResult.toFixed(4)}` : `Step 2: θ = atan2(y, x) = atan2(${y}, ${x}) = ${thetaDeg.toFixed(4)}°`
direction === 0 ? `Step 3: y = r·sin(θ_rad) = ${r} × sin(${thetaRad.toFixed(4)}) = ${yResult.toFixed(4)}` : `Step 3: Z-coordinate remains unchanged: z = ${z.toFixed(4)}`
